title: As France faces demographic decline, immigration emerges as both political and economic necessity

title: Israel bars RFI journalist from entering West Bank and increases pressure on foreign press
subhed: The expulsion of Alice Froussard, a journalist for Radio France Internationale (RFI), comes amid severe violence in the occupied territory and a total closure of the Gaza Strip to international media, where more than 260 Palestinian journalists have been killed since the attack of October 7, 2023.

title: Cocaine transporters, 'narcos' before their time, face trial after 15-year investigation
subhed: France is trying one of the country's oldest major cocaine trafficking cases, dating back to 2011 and involving smuggling between Guadeloupe and mainland France. The alleged ringleader has been identified and apprehended in Panama after years on the run.
